reason: Reviewers need the backend verification checklist for any Node-side response or test adjustments.
Checks should confirm degraded logging states are surfaced honestly and actionably.
Verification should confirm diagnostics improvements do not break stdout/stderr separation.
Most behavior changes are in the plugin layer, so plugin quality checks must be applied during review.
Runtime log tailing adds non-trivial plugin logic that should be reviewed for maintainability and safety.
Checks should verify runtime-log cursor state and scene-run state stay consistent across calls.
Review should validate the full feedback loop from scene run to MCP-visible diagnostics, not just isolated file parsing.
